request.description:
## Get Current Weather - Missing API Key (401)

**Purpose:** Verify API requires authentication and handles missing API key correctly.

**Test Case:** Security test - Request without authentication

**Parameters:**

- q: London (valid city)
    
- units: metric
    
- appid: MISSING (intentionally omitted)
    

**Expected Result:**

- Status: 401 Unauthorized
    
- Error message about invalid/missing API key
    
- No weather data returned
    

**Tests:**

- Status code 401
    
- Error message about authentication
    
- No sensitive data leaked

## Get Current Weather - Invalid API Key (401)

**Purpose:** Verify API rejects invalid/incorrect API keys.

**Test Case:** Security test - Request with wrong API key

**Parameters:**

- q: London (valid city)
    
- appid: INVALID123 (intentionally wrong)
    
- units: metric
    

**Expected Result:**

- Status: 401 Unauthorized
    
- Error message about invalid API key
    
- No weather data returned
    

**Tests:**

- Status code 401
    
- Error message about authentication
    
- No data leak

request.description:
## Get Current Weather - Valid City

**Purpose:** Verify API returns correct weather data for a valid city name.

**Test Case:** Happy path - User requests weather for London

**Parameters:**

- q: London (city name)
    
- appid: API key (from environment)
    
- units: metric (Celsius)
    

**Expected Result:**

- Status: 200 OK
    
- Response contains: temperature, humidity, weather description, city name
    
- All data types valid
    
- Temperature in reasonable range
    

**Tests:**

- Status code validation
    
- Response structure
    
- Data type validation
    
- Weather data accuracy
    
- Response time check

**Purpose:** Verify API handles invalid city names correctly.

**Test Case:** Negative test - User requests weather for non-existent city

**Parameters:**

- q: InvalidCityXYZ123 (intentionally invalid)
    
- appid: API key
    
- units: metric
    

**Expected Result:**

- Status: 404 Not Found
    
- Error message in response
    
- No weather data returned
    

**Tests:**

- Status code 404
    
- Response contains error message
    
- Response structure for errors

request.description:
# TC009: Get Current Weather - Valid Coordinates

**Purpose:**

Verify API returns correct weather data when searched by GPS coordinates.

**Test Case:**

Happy path - User provides latitude and longitude for London

**Parameters:**

• lat: 51.5074 (London latitude)

• lon: -0.1278 (London longitude)

• appid: {{apiKey}}

• units: metric

**Expected Result:**

• Status: 200 OK

• Response contains weather data

• Coordinates in response match request (±0.01 tolerance)

• All data types valid

**Tests:**

• Status code validation (200)

• Response time check (<2000ms)

• Content-Type validation (JSON)

• Response structure validation

• Coordinate data type validation

• Weather data type validation

• Weather array validation

• Latitude matches request (within 0.01)

• Longitude matches request(within 0.01)

• Temperature range validation

• Humidity range validation

## TC010: Get Current Weather - Invalid Coordinates

**Purpose:**

Verify API returns appropriate error for out-of-range coordinates.

**Test Case:**

Negative test - User provides invalid coordinate values

**Parameters:**

• lat: 999.999 (invalid - max is 90)

• lon: -999.999 (invalid - max is 180)

• appid: {{apiKey}}

• units: metric

**Expected Result:**

• Status: 400 Bad Request or 404 Not Found

• Error message about invalid coordinates

• No weather data returned

**Tests:**

• Status code validation (400 or  
404)

• Response time check (<2000ms)

• Content-Type validation (JSON)

• Error properties validation

• Error message meaningful

• Absence of weather data validation
